question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis; it only contains an introductory heading and a development timeline. There is no enumeration of chapters such as Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, etc.

feedback: Only the introduction content is briefly described. No description of other sections or chapters is provided, so the requirement to describe the contents of each section is not met.

feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be inferred from the text. It lacks an outline of chapters, sections, or a clear sequence of the document.
